default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of SchoolAI's Framer CMS for GrowthX team to understand content publishing process and workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SchoolAI is building a full resource center, including blog posts, webinars, podcasts, and press media](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Content goes through internal vetting process with former educators and marketing team before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [SchoolAI is undergoing website redesign, positioning/messaging update, and preparing for Series A announcement on April 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [GrowthX to use Slack for notifying SchoolAI team of ready articles; SchoolAI handles image creation and final publishing](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Topics

### CMS Structure and Access

  - [Blog posts accessed via SchoolAI project \> CMS \> Blog](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Fields include title, author, tile image, tags, and body content](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Extra image fields exist but not currently implemented in design](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [GrowthX writes initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [SchoolAI's content marketing team (former educators + marketing) reviews for resonance and performance](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Creative director creates on-brand tile images](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [SchoolAI team handles final vetting and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

### SEO and Tracking

  - [Meta descriptions and tags used for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Two main CTAs: "Sign up for free" and "Request a demo"](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX to track published URLs in Looker Studio weekly](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Upcoming Changes

  - [Website redesign in progress](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Positioning and messaging exercise underway](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Detailed style guide, tone, and voice documentation coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Content Formatting

  - [Basic HTML formatting (headers, bullets) available in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Considering adding key takeaways section to articles](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=972.0)
  - [Table of contents may be implemented for list-style posts](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to notify SchoolAI team via Slack when articles are ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [SchoolAI to finalize internal process for content ownership and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin using shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [SchoolAI to provide updated brand guidelines and messaging post-redesign](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Both teams to continue refining the content creation and publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/bzuGAZd2v_vYQCrVWaxQr2VxE-kqbpzs?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

action_items.description: Track published blog post URLs in Looker Studio weekly; update before weekly sync
